locations.clue: An independent coffee shop downtown.

locations.clue: An independent coffee shop on Central Avenue.

locations.name: Bella Brava
locations.clue: A New World Italian trattoria on Beach Drive.

locations.clue: A French-American brasserie on Beach Drive.

locations.name: Copper Shaker
locations.clue: A craft cocktail bar known for its Old Fashioneds.

locations.clue: A dedicated gluten-free bakery and coffeehouse on Central Ave near 66th St — the original location.

locations.clue: The downtown outpost of the gluten-free bakery and coffeehouse, at 200 Central.

locations.name: Da Sesto Italiano Ristorante e Vino

locations.clue: A renowned glass-art gallery in the Warehouse Arts District.

locations.clue: Coastal fine dining near the Vinoy.

locations.clue: A legendary Central Avenue dive bar since 1947.

locations.clue: A sprawling sports bar across from the ballpark.

locations.clue: A downtown specialty coffee shop.

locations.clue: A longtime downtown dive on the 200 block of Central — everything five bucks.

locations.clue: One of the largest Holocaust museums in the U.S., downtown.

locations.name: Gulfport Brewery + Eatery
locations.clue: A neighborhood brewpub in Gulfport.

locations.clue: A family-owned fishing charter and marina at John's Pass Village, in continuous operation since 1928 — one of Florida's oldest.

locations.name: Ikigai with a Taste of Saigon

locations.clue: A modern, award-winning Italian spot downtown.

locations.clue: A museum devoted to contemporary studio glass art.

locations.clue: An open-air downtown courtyard music venue, one of Florida’s oldest.

locations.clue: A craft cocktail bar on Central Avenue.

locations.clue: St. Pete's flagship fine-art museum on the downtown waterfront.

locations.clue: The open rec/kickball fields at North Shore Park.

locations.clue: A craft brewery known for its sours.

locations.clue: A Vietnamese-inspired cocktail bar downtown.
